findings.field: Experience bullets across TikTok / DiDi / Temu
findings.issue: Quantitative outcomes and scope signals are not consistently bolded, so the scanability is weaker than the resume's own formatting rules intend.
findings.fix: Bold the highest-signal numbers and scope markers in each experience section, especially team size, city count, and before/after metrics such as 13-person, 20+ cities, 95 minutes to 54 minutes, and 3.8 hours to 2.1 hours.

findings.issue: The opening framing leans on 'Candidate' instead of a direct role/field anchor, which weakens the first-screen signal.
findings.fix: Recast the first sentence to be role-first, such as 'Data analyst / analytics engineer with 3+ years...' while keeping the Python, SQL, Spark, and ETL signal.

findings.issue: The target title is Manager, but the resume only shows IC delivery. There is no verifiable people-management, mentoring, hiring, performance-review, or roadmap ownership evidence to support a manager reading.
findings.fix: If this scope is real, add one truthful bullet in the most relevant role describing lead ownership, stakeholder direction, mentoring, or team-level decision making. If it is not real, this resume is structurally better aligned to IC roles than to a Manager posting.

revision_priority: [MUST] Resolve the manager-scope gap with truthful lead/ownership evidence in the most relevant experience, or stop positioning this resume for Manager roles.
[MUST] Rework the first Summary sentence to be role-first rather than 'Candidate'-first, while preserving the 3+ years Python/SQL/Spark/ETL signal.
[SHOULD] Bold the most important scope/result numbers in each experience section to improve scanability.
[NICE] Keep the China-company stacks as-is; no localization translation changes are needed here.
raw_json.revision_instructions: [结构性错配] If you truly have people/lead ownership, add it to the most relevant DiDi or TikTok bullet as a concrete, verifiable scope statement. If you do not, do not continue pitching this as a Manager resume; it is better suited to IC or manager-adjacent roles. Rewrite the first Summary sentence to be role-led instead of 'Candidate'-led. Then bold the highest-value metrics and scope tokens across Experience, especially 13-person, 20+ cities, 95 minutes to 54 minutes, 3.8 hours to 2.1 hours, 31%, and 43%.
